title: SourceFileFacet
description: Custom OpenLineage facet for source file information

_producer.description: URI identifying the producer of this facet

_schemaURL.description: URL to the JSON schema for this facet

source_file.description: Path or name of the source file

source_system.description: External system the file came from (e.g., 'sftp', 'api', 'blob')

file_size_bytes.description: Size of the source file in bytes
